title: First Lagos Veterans Basketball appreciates Femi Awoyemi of Proshare Nigeria - FinancialEDGE
description: Proshare is a bespoke financial information service hub providing a critical link between investors and markets. They are an authority in their field and shape conversations or shake the table in order to hold the system accountable. The founder and chairman, Olufemi Awoyemi is an avid basketball lover and veteran. FLVBB appreciates him in recognition
html:
Proshare is a bespoke financial information service hub providing a critical link between investors and markets. They are an authority in their field and shape conversations or shake the table in order to hold the system accountable.

The founder and chairman, Olufemi Awoyemi is an avid basketball lover and veteran. FLVBB appreciates him in recognition of his contributions to the veterans basketball community and society at large.
